function.name: sendEmergencyAlert
function.description: Immediately notifies Dr. Hammond via SMS about an emergency patient. Use this during business hours when a patient describes an emergency and you need to alert the doctor RIGHT NOW — even if the patient is coming in directly and doesn't need to be added to the waitlist.

emergency_description.description: Brief description of the emergency as the patient described it — e.g. 'severe throbbing pain, can't sleep', 'knocked out tooth', 'swollen jaw'
